'''zabudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacan|seacan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacan|seacan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zabudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæbidith|zæbidith]] || [[word:zæbidij|zæbidij]] || [[word:zæbidish|zæbidish]] || [[word:zæbidi|zæbidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zabubuduth|zabubuduth]] || [[word:zabubuduj|zabubuduj]] || [[word:zabubudush|zabubudush]] || [[word:zabubudu|zabubudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zabuduth|zabuduth]] || [[word:zabuduj|zabuduj]] || [[word:zabudush|zabudush]] || [[word:zabudu|zabudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zabufduth|zabufduth]] || [[word:zabufduj|zabufduj]] || [[word:zabufdush|zabufdush]] || [[word:zabufduf|zabufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zabuduthu|zabuduthu]] || [[word:zabuduju|zabuduju]] || [[word:zabudushu|zabudushu]] || [[word:zabuduku|zabuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zabuduth|zabuduth]] || [[word:zabuduj|zabuduj]] || [[word:zabudush|zabudush]] || [[word:zabudu|zabudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zabuduthul|zabuduthul]] || [[word:zabudujul|zabudujul]] || [[word:zabudushul|zabudushul]] || [[word:zabudukul|zabudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zabuduthuthu|zabuduthuthu]] || [[word:zabudujuju|zabudujuju]] || [[word:zabudushushu|zabudushushu]] || [[word:zabuduku|zabuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zabuduthun|zabuduthun]] || [[word:zabudujun|zabudujun]] || [[word:zabudushun|zabudushun]] || [[word:zabudukun|zabudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zabuduthuoro|zabuduthuoro]] || [[word:zabudujuoro|zabudujuoro]] || [[word:zabudushuoro|zabudushuoro]] || [[word:zabudukuoro|zabudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
